name: Indexes (Source · Area · NPC · Encounter · Treasure · Hazard)

text.content:
Per-chapter source PDFs (split from your owned file for speed). Open one, or use the 📖 link on any area page to jump to the right chapter + page.

  • Ch.1 Edge of Anarchy — @UUID[JournalEntry.PDFCoTCTsource01]{open chapter PDF} (printed p.10–67)
  • Ch.2–6 + Appendices — chapter PDFs are produced by scripts/split_pdf_by_chapter.py; linked here as each chapter is converted.
